title: CoreWeave stock sinks 10% on weak revenue guidance, increased spending forecast
summary: CoreWeave's stock fell 10% after the company issued weak revenue guidance and forecast increased spending on its data center expansion. Despite S&P recently upgrading the company's credit rating due to debt financing, investors reacted negatively to the growth trajectory.
content: CoreWeave has been raising debt to finance its data center buildout, and S&P has boosted the company's credit rating.

zh.title: CoreWeave股票因弱收入指导和支出增加预测下跌10%
zh.summary: 在公司发布弱收入指导和预测数据中心扩展支出增加后，CoreWeave股票下跌10%。尽管标普最近因债务融资升级了公司的信用评级，投资者对增长轨迹反应消极。

title: Coinbase posts steep first-quarter loss after slide in crypto prices; shares fall 4%
summary: Coinbase reported a surprise first-quarter loss and below-consensus revenue following a crypto market downturn, causing shares to fall 4% after hours. The result reflects the platform's sensitivity to trading volumes and asset prices in volatile digital markets.
content: Crypto trading platform Coinbase reported a surprise first-quarter loss and weaker-than-estimated revenue after the market close Thursday.

zh.title: Coinbase在加密货币价格下滑后报告第一季度巨额亏损；股价盘后下跌4%
zh.summary: Coinbase在加密货币市场低迷后报告了意外的第一季度亏损和低于共识的收入，导致股价盘后下跌4%。这一结果反映了该平台对交易量和波动数字市场中资产价格的敏感性。

title: IREN inks AI infrastructure deal with Nvidia
summary: Data center operator Iren announced a strategic partnership with Nvidia to develop AI infrastructure capabilities. The deal strengthens Iren's positioning in the rapidly growing market for AI computational resources.
content: Data center operator IREN announced a partnership with semiconductor giant Nvidia.

zh.title: Iren与Nvidia达成人工智能基础设施协议
zh.summary: 数据中心运营商Iren宣布与Nvidia建立战略合作伙伴关系，以开发人工智能基础设施能力。该协议加强了Iren在快速增长的人工智能计算资源市场中的地位。

title: Trump gives EU ultimatum deadline to approve trade deal with US
summary: Trump set a deadline for the European Union to approve a trade agreement, escalating trade tensions as a federal court ruled his global tariff policy was unconstitutional. The ultimatum signals continued unpredictability in U.S. trade policy despite judicial constraints.
content: Trump's deadline to the European Union came as a trade court ruled his global tariff policy violated US law.

zh.title: 特朗普向欧盟下达最后通牒：批准美欧贸易协议
zh.summary: 特朗普为欧盟批准贸易协议设定了最后期限，加剧贸易紧张局势，同时联邦法院已裁定其全球关税政策违宪。这一最后通牒表明美国贸易政策将继续保持不可预测性，尽管面临司法制约。

title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
summary: Researchers are developing thermal energy storage technology using molecules that capture heat, inspired by sunburn mechanisms, to support decarbonization of heating systems. The innovation demonstrates how biomimetic approaches could address climate and sustainability challenges.
content: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

zh.title: 晒伤如何启发了新的储能技术
zh.summary: 研究人员正在开发热能储存技术，利用受晒伤机制启发的分子捕捉热量，以支持供热系统的脱碳化。这项创新展示了仿生学方法如何能够应对气候和可持续发展挑战。

title: Corning CEO to Cramer: Deals with 2 unnamed hyperscalers 'larger' than $6B Meta pact
summary: Corning's CEO disclosed to Jim Cramer that the company has signed deals with two unnamed hyperscalers exceeding the value of its $6 billion Meta contract. The revelation suggests significant hidden growth catalysts that could substantially boost the company's investment thesis.
content: The investment story for Corning looks even sweeter in the wake of Jim Cramer's sit-down with CEO Wendell Weeks.

zh.title: 康宁首席执行官对克莱默说：与两家不知名超大规模公司的交易"超过"60亿美元Meta协议
zh.summary: 康宁首席执行官向吉姆·克莱默透露，公司已与两家不知名的超大规模云计算公司签署交易，其价值超过其60亿美元Meta合同。这一披露表明存在重大隐藏增长催化剂，可能显著提升公司的投资前景。

title: Best credit cards for recurring bills and utilities
summary: CNBC Select has identified the five best credit cards for managing utilities and other recurring bills, helping consumers optimize their spending on essential services.
content: CNBC Select highlights the five best credit cards for utilities and other recurring bills.

zh.title: 管理公用事业和定期账单的最佳信用卡
zh.summary: CNBC精选已确定了五张最佳信用卡,用于管理公用事业和其他定期账单,帮助消费者优化基本服务上的支出。

title: Boeing, Citigroup CEOs set to join Trump on China visit next week
summary: Boeing and Citigroup CEOs are set to join President Trump on a China visit next week, following a six-week delay that occurred at the U.S. government's request due to tensions with Iran.
content: Trump's initial travel plan to China was delayed by about six weeks at the U.S.' request in light of the Iran war.

zh.title: 波音和花旗集团首席执行官将加入特朗普下周中国之行
zh.summary: 波音和花旗集团的首席执行官将于下周加入特朗普总统的中国之行,此前因伊朗局势紧张而按美国政府要求延迟了六周。

title: Paul Tudor Jones says U.S. is late to regulating AI: 'We should have already done it'
summary: Investor Paul Tudor Jones argues that the United States has lagged in regulating artificial intelligence and should have implemented rules earlier. His comments reflect concerns about America's competitive position against China in AI innovation and development.
content: The U.S. is locked into a heated rivalry with China and a race to lead AI innovation.

zh.title: 保罗·都铎·琼斯表示美国在人工智能监管方面落后
zh.summary: 投资者保罗·都铎·琼斯认为美国在人工智能监管方面落后,应该更早实施监管规则。他的评论反映了对美国在人工智能创新和发展方面与中国竞争力的担忧。

title: These stocks reporting earnings next week have a history of beating expectations
summary: Several companies including Copa Holdings and Nova have demonstrated a consistent pattern of beating analyst earnings expectations and subsequently experiencing stock price increases. Investors tracking stocks expected to report earnings next week may want to note these historical performers.
content: Companies including Copa Holdings and Nova have historically beaten analysts' earnings estimates and seen their shares rise as a result.

zh.title: 下周公布财报的这些股票有超越预期的历史记录
zh.summary: 包括Copa Holdings和Nova在内的多家公司表现出了持续超越分析师收益预期的模式，随后股价随之上升。追踪下周预计公布业绩的股票的投资者可能想要关注这些历史表现者。

title: Worried about hantavirus? Experts say it’s not the next pandemic.
summary: According to infectious disease experts, hantavirus poses minimal pandemic risk despite recent attention, describing the virus as a limited threat requiring specific environmental and timing conditions. An infectious disease physician characterized exposure as requiring wrong-place-wrong-time circumstances.
content: It’s a ‘one-off situation,’ according to an infectious-disease doctor. ‘You have to be in the wrong place at the wrong time.’

zh.title: 担心汉病毒？专家表示它不是下一场大流行病
zh.summary: 根据传染病专家的说法，尽管最近备受关注，汉病毒引发大流行的风险极小，被描述为一种有限威胁，需要特定的环境条件和时机。一位传染病医生将感染特征描述为需要时机和地点都不对的情况。

title: Arm CEO looks to set the record straight after the stock's post-earnings tumble
summary: Arm CEO Rene Haas is attempting to reassure investors following the company's stock decline after earnings results. Haas expressed confidence that Arm can secure adequate supply of its new CPUs despite recent market concerns.
content: Arm chief Rene Haas said he was "confident" the company would be able to secure additional supply of its new CPUs.

zh.title: Arm首席执行官寻求在财报后股价下跌后理清事实
zh.summary: Arm首席执行官Rene Haas在公司财报后股价下跌后，试图安抚投资者。Haas表示有信心Arm能够确保其新CPU有足够的供应，尽管近期存在市场担忧。

title: Shake Shack shares crater 30% after burger chain reports operating loss
summary: Shake Shack shares plummeted 30 percent after the burger chain reported an operating loss, marking a significant setback for the quick-service restaurant. CEO Rob Lynch attributed the loss to winter weather impacts and increased projections for new store openings this year.
content: Shake Shack CEO Rob Lynch said winter storms and an increase to its projections for store openings this year weighed on the company's results.

zh.title: Shake Shack股价在报告亏损后暴跌30%
zh.summary: Shake Shack股价在汉堡连锁店报告亏损后下跌了30%，这对快餐行业造成了重大打击。首席执行官Rob Lynch将亏损归因于冬季天气的影响和今年新店开业预期的增加。

title: Here's what to expect from Friday's release of the April jobs report
summary: Economists are bracing for the April jobs report set to release Friday, expecting data showing a cooling labor market that remains resilient despite various headwinds. The report will provide key insights into employment trends and economic health heading into the latter half of 2026.
content: The total picture is one of a labor market that, while undoubtedly cooling, is generally stable and resilient despite a number of challenges.

zh.title: 周五4月就业报告发布：需要关注的内容
zh.summary: 经济学家正在为周五发布的4月就业报告做准备，预计数据将显示劳动力市场有所冷却，但尽管面临各种挑战，仍保持韧性。该报告将为2026年下半年的就业趋势和经济健康状况提供关键见解。

title: EBay permanently bans GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen for putting its community ‘at risk’ following takeover attempt
summary: eBay has permanently banned GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen following his company's failed $55.5 billion acquisition proposal, citing risks to the eBay community from merchandise sales conducted through his account. The move represents significant fallout from Cohen's high-profile takeover attempt.
content: The GameStop chief, who proposed acquiring eBay for $55.5 billion Monday, was selling GameStop-related merchandise through his account.

zh.title: eBay因社区风险问题永久禁止GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen，源于收购失败
zh.summary: 在Ryan Cohen的公司失败的555亿美元收购提议之后，eBay永久禁止了GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen，理由是他通过其账户进行的商品销售对eBay社区造成风险。此举代表了Cohen高调收购尝试的重大后果。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Planet Fitness, Whirlpool, Vital Farms, Shake Shack & more
summary: Several stocks posted significant midday price movements, including Planet Fitness, Whirlpool, Vital Farms, and Shake Shack. The moves reflect investor reactions to various corporate developments and market conditions throughout the trading session.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

zh.title: 股票在中午交易中的最大变动：Planet Fitness、惠而浦、Vital Farms、Shake Shack等
zh.summary: 多只股票在中午交易中出现了显著的价格波动，包括Planet Fitness、惠而浦、Vital Farms和Shake Shack。这些变动反映了投资者对各种企业发展和整个交易时段市场状况的反应。

title: One defense stock has fallen so far it's attractive for a short-term bounce and longer-term, Jay Woods says
summary: A defense contractor stock has declined substantially since the Iran war began but now presents an opportunity for both short-term and longer-term gains, according to analyst Jay Woods. The stock peaked on March 2, the first trading day after the conflict started.
content: The lead contractor on the F-35 fighter peaked on March 2, literally the first trading day after the Iran war started.

zh.title: 一只国防股已经跌幅很大，对短期反弹和长期来说都很有吸引力，Jay Woods表示
zh.summary: 据分析师Jay Woods表示，一只国防承包商股票自伊朗战争开始以来大幅下跌，但现在为短期和长期收益都提供了机会。该股票在3月2日（冲突开始后的第一个交易日）达到了高峰。

title: Beef is very expensive right now — and Shake Shack just lost money for the first time in years
summary: Shake Shack reported its first annual loss in years as elevated beef costs and consumer spending weakness pressured results, causing shares to drop nearly 30 percent. The situation underscores challenges facing the restaurant industry amid inflation and cautious consumer behavior.
content: The burger chain’s shares were dropping nearly 30% in the face of cost inflation and challenging consumer sentiment.

zh.title: 牛肉现在非常昂贵——Shake Shack多年来首次出现亏损
zh.summary: Shake Shack报告了多年来首次出现年度亏损，因为高企的牛肉成本和消费者支出疲软对业绩造成了压力，导致股价下跌近30%。这种情况突出了餐饮业在通货膨胀和谨慎消费者行为环境中面临的挑战。

title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
summary: A mysterious bank financing letter backing GameStop's $55.5 billion eBay acquisition bid reveals a significant structural obstacle: the combined company would need to maintain investment-grade credit status. The requirement highlights financing challenges in the proposed deal.
content: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.

zh.title: 瑞恩·科恩神秘银行信函支持GameStop收购eBay出价揭示交易重大问题
zh.summary: 支持GameStop 555亿美元eBay收购出价的神秘银行融资信函揭示了一个重大的结构性障碍：合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用评级。该要求突显了拟议交易中的融资挑战。

title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
summary: Traders using the Kalshi prediction market are increasingly betting that a nuclear deal between the United States and Iran could be reached by 2027. The shift reflects recent reports that the two nations are negotiating a one-page memo to end their ongoing conflict.
content: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.

zh.title: Kalshi交易员看到美国-伊朗核协议在2027年达成的可能性上升
zh.summary: 使用Kalshi预测市场的交易员越来越多地押注美国和伊朗之间的核协议可能在2027年达成。这一转变反映了两国正在谈判一份一页备忘录以结束其持续冲突的最近报告。

title: Trump Accounts could allow direct stock donations down the road: Reports
summary: Trump Accounts may eventually enable direct stock donations as a new investment feature, according to recent reports. The potential capability could expand investment options for account holders and create new ways to transfer assets.
content: Trump Accounts could allow direct stock donations, according to reports. Here's what that change could mean for investors.

zh.title: Trump账户未来可能允许直接股票捐赠：报告
zh.summary: 根据最近的报告，Trump账户最终可能启用直接股票捐赠作为新的投资功能。这种潜在功能可以为账户持有者扩展投资选项，并为资产转移创造新的方式。

title: Major rail disruption expected in southern England until end of day
summary: Network Rail warns of ongoing delays for rail passengers in southern England despite resolving the radio fault, with disruptions expected throughout the day. The incident highlights infrastructure vulnerabilities affecting commuter travel.
content: A radio fault has been resolved but passengers could continue to face long delays, warns Network Rail.

zh.title: 英格兰南部铁路预期中断到今天结束
zh.summary: 英国国家铁路公司警告，尽管解决了无线电故障，英格兰南部铁路乘客仍将面临持续延误，全天预期中断。该事件突显了影响通勤出行的基础设施漏洞。

title: Bitcoin’s unusual technical action points to a crypto bull market, says Fundstrat’s Tom Lee
summary: Fundstrat strategist Tom Lee identifies bullish technical indicators in Bitcoin's recent price action, suggesting the cryptocurrency market may be entering a sustained upward phase. The analysis reflects growing confidence among some analysts about crypto's near-term direction.
content: Lee says activity in recent months point to a bullish phase for cryptocurrencies.

zh.title: 比特币不寻常的技术走势预示加密货币牛市，Fundstrat的Tom Lee表示
zh.summary: Fundstrat策略师Tom Lee在比特币最近的价格走势中发现了看涨的技术指标，表明加密货币市场可能正在进入持续上升阶段。这一分析反映了一些分析师对加密货币近期走势信心的增强。

title: Are businesses really starting to hire again? The April jobs report will help clue us in.
summary: The April jobs report will reveal whether companies are reversing a period of weak hiring, with early signals suggesting modest recovery in the labor market. Employment trends are critical for understanding broader economic health amid mixed economic signals.
content: Are companies adding more workers after an unusually weak stretch of hiring? The jury is out, but signs of recovery in the labor market are emerging.

zh.title: 企业真的开始重新招聘了吗？4月就业报告将帮助我们了解情况
zh.summary: 4月就业报告将揭示企业是否正在扭转一段时期的招聘疲软，早期信号表明劳动力市场出现了温和复苏。就业趋势对于理解经济信号混合背景下的经济整体健康状况至关重要。

title: Peloton beats estimates on revenue as higher subscription prices offer a boost
summary: Peloton exceeded revenue estimates by raising subscription prices, with CEO Peter Stern defending the increase as reflecting genuine value to customers. The price hikes demonstrate the company's ability to monetize its user base amid fitness industry competition.
content: Peloton CEO Peter Stern told CNBC that the company believes raising prices on its subscriptions was a value-driven move.

zh.title: Peloton 通过提高订阅价格超出收入估计
zh.summary: Peloton 通过提高订阅价格超出了收入预期，CEO 彼得·斯特恩为此辩护，称这反映了对客户的真实价值。价格上涨表明该公司在健身行业竞争中将用户群变现的能力。

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Uber, Microsoft, Disney, CoreWeave, Alcoa & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on tech and industrial stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Microsoft, and several others on Thursday. These analyst calls often guide investor sentiment and trading decisions across key market sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Thursday.

zh.title: 周四最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、优步、微软、迪士尼、CoreWeave、美铝等
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师在周四对包括英伟达、苹果、微软等在内的科技和工业股票发布了重要评级。这些分析师评级通常指导投资者情绪和主要市场部门的交易决策。

title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 20%
summary: Whirlpool attributes severe declines in U.S. appliance sales to the Iran conflict and resulting consumer confidence collapse, with the stock falling 20% as the company faces recession-level demand destruction. The warning signals broader economic vulnerability to geopolitical shocks.
content: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.

zh.title: 惠而浦表示伊朗战争导致"衰退级别的行业衰退"。股价下跌 20%
zh.summary: 惠而浦将美国家电销售的严重下滑归因于伊朗冲突和随之而来的消费者信心崩溃，公司股价下跌 20%，面临衰退级别的需求破坏。这一警告表明经济对地缘政治冲击的更广泛脆弱性。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Whirlpool, Shake Shack, McDonald's, Arm Holdings & more
summary: Several major stocks including Whirlpool, Shake Shack, McDonald's, and Arm Holdings showed significant premarket volatility on Thursday. Premarket movers often signal broader market sentiment ahead of official trading sessions.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

zh.title: 股市盘前最大波动：惠而浦、Shake Shack、麦当劳、Arm等
zh.summary: 包括惠而浦、Shake Shack、麦当劳和Arm等多家主要股票周四在盘前交易中出现重大波动。盘前波动通常预示着官方交易开始前更广泛的市场情绪。

title: Family office deal-making rebounds in April with healthcare bets
summary: Family office investments rebounded in April with healthcare startups accounting for nearly a third of deals, signaling renewed confidence among wealthy investors in the health tech sector. The trend reflects ongoing interest in healthcare innovation despite broader economic uncertainties.
content: Healthcare startups made up nearly a third of April's investments by family offices.

zh.title: 家族办公室四月交易活动反弹，押注医疗健康
zh.summary: 四月份家族办公室投资反弹，医疗健康初创公司占交易数量的近三分之一，表明富有投资者对健康科技领域重新充满信心。这一趋势反映了尽管存在更广泛的经济不确定性，但对医疗创新的持续兴趣。

title: Families still see college as a good investment — figuring out how to pay for it is the challenge
summary: Despite rising tuition costs, 82% of families planning college believe it remains a worthwhile investment, though financing challenges persist as a major barrier. The disconnect between perceived value and affordability highlights ongoing tensions in higher education access.
content: Roughly 82% of families with high school students considering college say they believe it will be worth the high cost, according to a new report by Sallie.

zh.title: 家庭仍认为大学教育是一项好投资——如何支付费用是挑战
zh.summary: 尽管学费成本上升，计划送孩子上大学的82%的家庭仍认为这是值得的投资，但融资挑战仍然是一个主要障碍。感知价值与可承受性之间的脱节突出了高等教育获取方面持续存在的矛盾。

title: Ageism is still an acceptable bias among employers — and it’s costing shareholders billions
summary: Age-based employment discrimination remains widespread despite mounting evidence that experienced workers drive shareholder value, with companies' bias-driven hiring practices destroying billions in value. The prevalence of ageism contradicts data showing experienced workers improve corporate performance.
content: Discarding experienced workers isn’t a strategy — it’s corporate self-sabotage that AI won’t fix.

zh.title: 年龄歧视仍是雇主可接受的偏见——而且它正在花费股东数十亿美元
zh.summary: 尽管有越来越多的证据表明经验丰富的工人能推动股东价值，但基于年龄的就业歧视仍然普遍存在，企业的偏见驱动的招聘实践正在摧毁数十亿美元的价值。年龄歧视的普遍性与经验丰富的工人改善公司业绩的数据相矛盾。

title: Middle managers are on the chopping block in the AI workplace. Here’s how to save your job.
summary: AI-driven automation is disproportionately eliminating middle management positions as companies pursue efficiency gains, creating challenges for a traditionally stable career tier. The trend reflects how AI is restructuring corporate hierarchies and redefining management roles.
content: AI has taken the corporate quest for efficiency to a new level — and it’s middle managers who seem to be getting left behind.

zh.title: 在人工智能工作场所中，中层管理人员正面临被裁减——以下是如何保住工作的方法
zh.summary: 随着企业追求效率提升，人工智能驱动的自动化正在不成比例地消除中层管理职位，对传统上稳定的职业阶层造成挑战。这一趋势反映了人工智能如何重组公司层级结构和重新定义管理角色。

title: Kevin Warsh’s undisclosed wealth leaves a $100 million mystery atop the Federal Reserve
summary: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's financial disclosures raise transparency concerns, with roughly $100 million in undisclosed assets raising questions about potential conflicts of interest. The Senate's imminent confirmation despite incomplete financial transparency highlights ongoing scrutiny of Fed leadership.
content: The Fed chair nominee has filed 69 pages about his finances that mostly tell you what he won’t tell you. The Senate is about to confirm him anyway.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什的未披露财富在美联储顶部留下1亿美元的谜团
zh.summary: 美联储主席候选人凯文·沃什的财务披露引发了透明度问题，大约1亿美元的未披露资产引发了对潜在利益冲突的疑问。尽管财务透明度不完整，但参议院即将确认，突显了对美联储领导层的持续审查。

title: Amazon to carry Ozempic pill at U.S. kiosks, offer same-day delivery
summary: Amazon expanded its pharmacy services to include Novo Nordisk's Ozempic pill at its kiosks with same-day delivery options, marking the e-commerce giant's entry into diabetes medication distribution. The move reflects Amazon's continued expansion into healthcare and its logistics advantage in prescription delivery.
content: Amazon said on Thursday its pharmacy will stock Novo Nordisk's Ozempic pill to treat type 2 diabetes at its kiosks and ⁠offer same-day delivery of the drug.

zh.title: 亚马逊在美国自助货柜推出Ozempic，提供当日送达服务
zh.summary: 亚马逊扩展其药房服务，在自助货柜中加入诺和诺德的Ozempic，并提供当日送达选项，标志着这家电商巨头进入糖尿病药物配送领域。此举反映了亚马逊在医疗保健领域的持续扩张以及其在处方药配送中的物流优势。

title: Gold and silver's historic rally could resume 'as fog of war lifts', market watchers say
summary: Gold prices surged 1.2% to $4,750 per ounce as market optimism grew about potential peace negotiations between the U.S. and Iran after 69 days of conflict. The rally reflects precious metals' typical safe-haven demand during geopolitical uncertainty and hopes for resolution.
content: On Thursday, spot gold jumped 1.2% to $4,750 per ounce amid hopes that the U.S. and Iran could be nearing a deal to bring the 69-day war to an end.

zh.title: 市场观察人士表示，随着"战争迷雾消散"，黄金和白银的历史性涨势可能恢复
zh.summary: 黄金价格上涨1.2%至每盎司4750美元，因为市场对美国与伊朗经过69天冲突后潜在和平谈判的乐观情绪上升。此次上涨反映了贵金属在地缘政治不确定性期间的典型避险需求，以及对局势解决的希望。

title: McDonald's earnings top estimates despite 'challenging environment'
summary: McDonald's exceeded earnings estimates despite admitting a challenging economic environment, though the stock has declined 10% annually amid broader economic concerns. The earnings beat underscores the fast-food giant's resilience but masks underlying investor worries about consumer spending.
content: Shares of McDonald's have fallen 10% over the last year, hurt by concerns about the broader economy.

zh.title: 麦当劳业绩超预期，尽管面临"具有挑战性的环境"
zh.summary: 麦当劳在承认面临具有挑战性的经济环境的情况下，仍超过了盈利预期，尽管该股在更广泛的经济担忧中年均下跌10%。这项业绩超越突显了这家快餐巨头的韧性，但掩盖了投资者对消费者支出的潜在担忧。

title: Shell profits rise as Iran war pushes oil prices higher
summary: Shell reported $6.92 billion in Q1 2026 profits, significantly boosted by rising oil prices driven by Iran tensions. The energy giant benefited from geopolitical instability in the Middle East that pushed global fossil fuel markets higher. This marks strong financial performance amid ongoing regional conflict.
content: The energy giant reports profits of $6.92bn for the first three months of the year.

zh.title: 壳牌利润上升，伊朗战争推高油价
zh.summary: 壳牌公司报告2026年第一季度利润达69.2亿美元，主要受伊朗紧张局势推高油价的推动。这家能源巨头从中东地缘政治不稳定中受益，推高了全球化石燃料市场。这标志着在持续地区冲突中取得强劲的财务表现。

title: Shell tops profit estimates as Iran war boosts oil price, cuts share buybacks
summary: Shell exceeded quarterly profit expectations as the Iran conflict drove up oil prices, enabling stronger earnings. The company's performance reflects broader energy market gains from Middle East tensions. Shell adjusted its financial strategy by reducing share buybacks.
content: Britain's Shell posted stronger-than-expected quarterly profit as the Iran war sent fossil fuel prices soaring.

zh.title: 伊朗战争推高油价，壳牌超过利润预期并减少股份回购
zh.summary: 壳牌超过季度利润预期，伊朗冲突推高油价，实现了更强劲的收益。公司业绩反映了中东紧张局势带来的更广泛能源市场收益。壳牌通过减少股份回购调整了其财务战略。

title: Asian Development Bank's $70 billion energy and digital infra push puts Southeast Asia center stage
summary: The Asian Development Bank announced a $70 billion investment plan for energy and digital infrastructure across Asia and the Pacific through 2035, positioning Southeast Asia as a key focus area. This initiative aims to modernize the region's infrastructure and support sustainable development. Southeast Asian nations stand to benefit significantly from this major capital deployment.
content: Southeast Asia to benefit significantly from Asian Development Bank's $70 billion new energy and digital infrastructure plan in Asia and the Pacific by 2035.

zh.title: 亚洲开发银行700亿美元能源和数字基础设施计划将东南亚推向中心舞台
zh.summary: 亚洲开发银行宣布了一项700亿美元的投资计划，用于2035年前亚洲和太平洋地区的能源和数字基础设施，将东南亚定位为关键焦点区域。该倡议旨在使该地区基础设施现代化并支持可持续发展。东南亚国家将从这项重大资本部署中获得显著收益。

title: 'How loan shark threats keep victims like me silent'
summary: A BBC investigation reveals how loan shark threats and intimidation tactics silence victims, with authorities seizing weapons including meat cleavers and samurai swords from suspects. The feature highlights the criminal infrastructure behind illegal lending operations and their violent enforcement methods. Victim silence remains a barrier to law enforcement efforts.
content: A meat cleaver and samurai sword are among items seized from suspects, shown exclusively to the BBC.

zh.title: 高利贷威胁如何让我这样的受害者保持沉默
zh.summary: BBC调查揭示高利贷威胁和恐吓战术如何让受害者沉默，当局缴获了包括砍刀和武士刀在内的武器。该报道突出了非法放贷业务背后的犯罪基础设施及其暴力执法方法。受害者的沉默仍然是执法工作的障碍。

title: It’s not just Big Oil. Wind giants welcome profit beats as Iran war spurs energy pivot
summary: Energy companies beyond traditional oil producers are profiting from the Iran conflict, with Norwegian firm Equinor reporting expectations for boosted returns in renewable energy transition industries. The geopolitical crisis is accelerating investment and demand across the broader energy sector. Both fossil fuel and clean energy companies are benefiting from the market dynamics.
content: Norway's Equinor told CNBC that the company expects the Iran war to deliver a boost to its transition industries.

zh.title: 不仅仅是大石油公司。风能巨头欢迎利润增长，伊朗战争推动能源转向
zh.summary: 除了传统石油生产商外，能源公司也在从伊朗冲突中获利，挪威公司Equinor预期可再生能源转型行业的回报会增加。地缘政治危机正在加快整个能源部门的投资和需求。化石燃料和清洁能源公司都在从市场动态中受益。

title: Oil rises as U.S.-Iran tensions keep traders focused on Strait of Hormuz risks
summary: Oil prices increased as traders assessed ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions and potential disruption risks in the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy chokepoint. Market concerns center on the possibility of supply disruptions from Middle East conflict escalation. The geopolitical uncertainty continues to drive price volatility in energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose Thursday, as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East amid concerns over renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S.

zh.title: 随着美国-伊朗紧张局势使交易员关注霍尔木兹海峡风险，油价上升
zh.summary: 随着交易员评估持续的美国-伊朗紧张局势和霍尔木兹海峡可能的供应中断风险，油价上升。霍尔木兹海峡是全球关键的能源枢纽。市场关注的焦点是中东冲突升级导致的供应中断的可能性。地缘政治不确定性继续推动能源市场的价格波动。

title: SoftBank shares surge over 16% as Japan tech-fueled rally lifts Nikkei 225 to record highs
summary: SoftBank's share price surged 16% as Japan's stock market rallied following the extended Golden Week holidays, with the Nikkei 225 index climbing over 5% to record levels. Japan's technology sector led the market gains during this period. The broad market strength reflected investor optimism in the country's tech-driven economy.
content: The benchmark Nikkei 225 surged over 5% to a record high as Japan reopened after extended Golden Week holidays.

zh.title: 软银股价飙升逾16% 日本科技股行情推动日经225指数创历史新高
zh.summary: 软银股价在日本股市反弹中飙升16%。这次反弹发生在黄金周假期结束后，日经225指数上涨逾5%至历史新高。日本科技板块在此期间领导市场上涨。广泛的市场强势反映了投资者对日本科技驱动经济的乐观情绪。

title: Berkshire-owned distribution giant to deploy driverless big rigs across U.S. Sun Belt
summary: Berkshire Hathaway-owned McLane Company, one of America's largest distribution firms, is deploying autonomous trucks developed by Aurora across the U.S. Sun Belt region to serve its restaurant supply business. This partnership represents a major expansion of self-driving vehicle deployment in logistics. The move demonstrates growing adoption of autonomous technology in transportation.
content: Berkshire Hathaway-owned McLane, one of America's biggest distribution companies, is deploying self-driving big rigs with Aurora for its restaurants business.

zh.title: 伯克希尔旗下配送巨头在美国阳光地带部署无人驾驶卡车
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司旗下的美国最大配送公司之一McLane Company，正在美国阳光地带部署由Aurora开发的自动驾驶卡车，以服务其餐厅供应业务。这项合作代表了自动驾驶车辆在物流领域部署的重大扩展。此举展示了自动驾驶技术在运输领域的日益增长采用。

title: Hantavirus outbreaks rarely happen. This Andes strain is ‘a complicated public-health situation.’
summary: A rare Andes strain hantavirus outbreak has emerged, with at least two people departing the MV Hondius cruise ship in late April and one testing positive. The Andes strain represents a concerning public health development given its rarity and potential spread through cruise ship populations. Health authorities are monitoring the situation closely.
content: At least two people departed the MV Hondius cruise ship in late April and one has tested positive for the Andes strain, a type of hantavirus.

zh.title: 汉坦病毒疫情罕见，但这种安第斯菌株是"一个复杂的公共卫生情况"
zh.summary: 罕见的安第斯菌株汉坦病毒疫情已经出现，至少两人在四月下旬离开了Hondius号邮轮，其中一人检测呈阳性。鉴于其罕见性和通过邮轮人群传播的潜在风险，安第斯菌株代表了令人担忧的公共卫生进展。卫生部门正在密切监测局势。

title: Inside India newsletter: Social media is reshaping the world's fastest-growing market for global brands
summary: Social media influencers in India are driving consumer behavior change by pushing audiences to scrutinize product labels and demanding healthier options from established companies. This trend threatens traditional brand dominance as consumers consider switching to newer entrants that align with influencer recommendations. India's rapidly growing consumer market is experiencing disruption through social media-driven consumer activism.
content: Social media influencers are urging consumers to read labels and pushing traditional companies to make healthier products or risk being replaced by newer entrants.

zh.title: 印度通讯：社交媒体正在重塑全球品牌增长最快的市场
zh.summary: 印度的社交媒体影响者通过促使观众审查产品标签并要求老牌公司提供更健康的选择,推动了消费行为的改变。这一趋势威胁了传统品牌的主导地位,因为消费者考虑转向与影响者建议相符的新兴企业。印度快速增长的消费市场正通过社交媒体驱动的消费者运动经历着颠覆。

title: Japan's Nikkei 225 tops 62,000 for the first time as Asia markets look past Trump’s Iran threats
summary: Japan's Nikkei 225 index reached a record high above 62,000 as Asia-Pacific markets gained momentum despite tensions over Iran. The rally reflects investor optimism and suggests regional market confidence despite ongoing geopolitical concerns.
content: Asia-Pacific markets jumped, shrugging off renewed tensions in the Middle East.

zh.title: 日本日经225指数首次突破62000点，亚洲市场对特朗普伊朗威胁保持乐观
zh.summary: 日本日经225指数在伊朗局势加剧的背景下突破62000点历史新高，亚太市场保持涨势。此次上涨反映了投资者的乐观情绪，表明地区市场对当前地缘政治风险有信心。

title: Arm puts a big number on its newest venture, but its stock falls
summary: Arm announced over $2 billion in customer demand for its first-ever data-center CPU, marking significant expansion beyond mobile chips. Despite the strong demand signal, the stock declined, suggesting investor concerns about execution or valuation.
content: The chip designer said it has more than $2 billion in customer demand for its first-ever data-center CPU

zh.title: Arm为新项目估值很高，但股价反而下跌
zh.summary: Arm宣布其首款数据中心CPU获得超过20亿美元的客户需求，标志着公司超越移动芯片的重大扩展。尽管需求信号强劲，股票仍然下跌，表明投资者对执行能力或估值存在顾虑。

title: My husband has a $225,000 pension. We don’t trust his ‘too big to fail’ employer. Where do we invest it?
summary: A household seeks investment guidance for a $225,000 pension, prioritizing guaranteed returns and minimal risk amid concerns about the employer's stability. The question highlights broader anxieties about pension security even at large corporations.
content: “Ideally, we are looking for a guaranteed return with minimal risk.”

zh.title: 我丈夫有22.5万美元的养老金，我们不信任他那个"大而不倒"的雇主，该如何投资？
zh.summary: 一个家庭为22.5万美元的养老金寻求投资建议，优先选择有保证的回报和低风险策略，同时担忧雇主的财务稳定性。这个问题反映了人们对大企业养老金安全的广泛担忧。

title: Fortinet’s stock rockets higher as earnings help dispel fears of AI disruption
summary: Fortinet's stock surged following strong earnings that eased investor worries about artificial intelligence disrupting its cybersecurity business. The company attributed growth to an increasingly complex threat environment requiring robust security solutions.
content: An “increasingly complex threat environment” is boosting demand for Fortinet’s cybersecurity offerings

zh.title: Fortinet股价飙升，收益缓解AI颠覆担忧
zh.summary: Fortinet股价在强劲收益推动下大幅上涨，缓解了投资者对人工智能破坏其网络安全业务的担忧。该公司将增长归因于日益复杂的威胁环境，需要强大的安全解决方案。

title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 hit an all-time high above 7,300 as traders grew optimistic about a potential Iran deal resolution. The rally reflects shifting sentiment regarding geopolitical tensions and their economic implications.
content: The S&P 500 hit a new all-time high and closed above 7,300 for the first time in Wednesday's session as traders grew optimistic about a deal in Iran.

zh.title: 周四股市大事件：下一交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数创下7300点以上的历史新高，因交易者对伊朗协议可能解决持乐观态度。此次上涨反映了交易者对地缘政治紧张局势及其经济影响看法的转变。
